name: storybook-codex
description: Plugin-ready Codex skill for creating and updating React Storybook stories with controls, autodocs, and optional Chromatic scaffolding.

interface.shortDescription: Generate React Storybook stories with controls and autodocs.
interface.longDescription: A focused Codex skill for creating and updating React Storybook stories using modern object stories, selective controls, autodocs tags, and optional Chromatic setup.
defaultPrompt: Use $storybook-codex to create stories for src/components/Button.tsx.
Use $storybook-codex to update existing stories to StoryObj and autodocs.
Use $storybook-codex to scaffold Chromatic for this Storybook project.
